what_happened: Recommended Under 217.5. Game went over — ended around 220-230.
why_it_failed: Cited SAC team-wide Under trends without checking H2H history. Oct 22 PHX vs SAC went to 236 total. Q2 ran at 5.0 pts/min (62 combined). Didn't flag early enough when Q1 hit 52 combined.
fix_for_next_time: 1. ALWAYS pull H2H game totals for specific matchup before recommending over/under. 2. When Q1 exceeds 50 combined pts, flag Under as HIGH RISK immediately. 3. Do not rely on season-wide team trends — matchup-specific pace is more predictive. 4. Check if either team has a tendency to run hot in specific quarter matchups.

what_happened: Clifford 20+ PRA recommended. He had 2 pts in 24 min (PRA ~8 at that point).
why_it_failed: Assumed hot streak would continue without checking Clifford's stats vs PHX specifically. Did not pull live box score mid-game — assumed he was performing instead of checking.
fix_for_next_time: 1. Pull live box score every time user asks for an update — never assume. 2. Check player prop hit rates in this SPECIFIC matchup, not just recent form. 3. For streak-based props, note that streaks can end in any game.

what_happened: Did not flag cash-out opportunity when Under was still likely (around Q1 end).
why_it_failed: No systematic trigger for flagging cash-out windows.
fix_for_next_time: When a parlay leg (especially the total) starts trending bad, proactively mention the cash-out option and estimate EV of cashing vs riding.

what_happened: Ticket 1 ($50 → +$212): PHX -3.5 ✅, Under 222.5 ✅, Clifford 15+ PRA ✅. Ticket 2 ($200 → +$1,500): Raynaud 10+ boards ✅, Under 217.5 ✅ (barely), Clifford 20+ PRA ✅. Total profit: +$1,712 on $250 staked.
fix_for_next_time: Key takeaways from hits: 1. Prop legs on heavily shorthanded teams (Sabonis+Murray+Hunter+LaVine all out) are high-value. 2. PHX blowout in Q4 was the saving grace on both unders — garbage time kills pace. 3. Don't cash out when 2 of 3 legs are already locked and the total has a buffer. 4. Clifford and Raynaud props were the right calls — matchup context (no bigs) was the edge.

what_happened: Took MIL ML + Giannis 40+ PRA SGP live at halftime (MIL up 5). Giannis had 22 PRA in only 14 of 24 possible first-half minutes. ATL surged in Q3, went up 14, Giannis got managed down the stretch. Final: ATL 112 MIL 98. Giannis ~28 PRA. Both legs dead.
why_it_failed: 3 compounding errors: 1) Ignored that Giannis only played 14/24 min in H1 — minutes management signal. 2) SGP ML+PRA has negative failure correlation: team losing = star plays less = both legs die simultaneously. 3) MIL +5 halftime is NOT a safe live ML threshold — 1 possession game.
fix_for_next_time: 1. Flag if star played <65% of H1 minutes — high risk for large PRA props. 2. Never take ML+star PRA SGP unless team leads by 10+ (low blowout risk). 3. Live ML only when team leads by 8+ at half. 4. Check minutes management pattern in game notes before recommending prop.
